scripts.db-create: PGPASSWORD=password psql -h 127.0.0.1 -p 6434 -U user -d postgres -c 'CREATE DATABASE parity' || echo 'already exists'
scripts.db-migrate: PGPASSWORD=password psql -h 127.0.0.1 -p 6434 -U user -d parity -f schema.sql && PGPASSWORD=password psql -h 127.0.0.1 -p 6434 -U user -d parity -f seed.sql && PGPASSWORD=password psql -h 127.0.0.1 -p 6434 -U user -d parity -f seed-extras.sql
scripts.start-ts: ZERO_USE_RUST_IVM_V2=0 ZERO_PORT=4858 ZERO_UPSTREAM_DB=postgresql://user:password@127.0.0.1:6434/parity ZERO_REPLICA_FILE=/tmp/ivm-parity-ts.db ZERO_SCHEMA_FILE=./schema.json ZERO_APP_ID=parity_ts ZERO_NUM_SYNC_WORKERS=2 ZERO_ADMIN_PASSWORD=devdev ZERO_AUTH_SECRET=devsecret npx zero-cache
scripts.start-rs: ZERO_USE_RUST_IVM_V2=1 ZERO_PORT=4868 ZERO_UPSTREAM_DB=postgresql://user:password@127.0.0.1:6434/parity ZERO_REPLICA_FILE=/tmp/ivm-parity-rs.db ZERO_SCHEMA_FILE=./schema.json ZERO_APP_ID=parity_rs ZERO_NUM_SYNC_WORKERS=2 ZERO_ADMIN_PASSWORD=devdev ZERO_AUTH_SECRET=devsecret npx zero-cache
scripts.test: npm run fuzz && npm run seed-corpus && npm run refresh-stats && npm run sweep:hydrate && npm run sweep:advance && npm run report && cat parity_report.md | head -30
